creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
We were able to celebrate Ed’s birthday in a private pod! 🥰🎉 @thepodsdubai used to be a very expensive dining venue, but recently they launched a lunch set menu for only AED 99 per person without an extra charge for standard pod usage! 

Here are the currents deals available:
🍴2 course lunch, Monday to Sunday: AED 99 
🍷3 drinks set, 1 to 4 pm: AED 99
🍳Breakfast is also available at a much lower price! 

Please note:
❗️Free use of standard pod is only up to 2 hours. ❗️Seaview pod has a booking fee of AED 100.
‼️ Call ahead if you’re celebrating a special occasion and want to surprise your loved one. Apparently, they haven’t seen my email about Ed’s birthday. So I had to inform them directly which kinda ruins the surprise. 😅 But overall, we had a great celebration. @edzphotography was so happy and so am I!

Save this for your special day! 💗

#Dubai #mydubai #visitdubai #dubaireels #lifewithladyanne #ladyandhersweetescapes #thepodsdubai #BluewatersDubai #dubairestaurant #DubaiDestinations

transcription.text: Oh yeah, say that you'll remember Oh yeah, dancing in September Oh yeah
